categories.label: Hypotension
categories.advice: Evaluate for causes of hypoperfusion or shock.

categories.label: Elevated
categories.advice: Recommend lifestyle modifications and monitor.

categories.label: Stage 1 HT
categories.advice: Consider initiating antihypertensive therapy if indicated.

categories.label: Stage 2 HT
categories.advice: Initiate antihypertensive therapy and monitor closely.

categories.label: Hypertensive Crisis
categories.advice: Immediate medical intervention required to prevent organ damage.

categories.label: Severe Bradycardia
categories.advice: Urgent evaluation for heart block or severe ischemia.

categories.label: Bradycardia
categories.advice: Evaluate for medication effects, hypothyroidism, or athletic conditioning.

categories.label: Tachycardia
categories.advice: Assess for fever, pain, anxiety, or underlying disease.

categories.label: Severe Tachycardia
categories.advice: Obtain immediate ECG to evaluate for tachyarrhythmias.

categories.label: Hypothermia
categories.advice: Initiate active rewarming and investigate underlying cause.

categories.label: Low-grade fever
categories.advice: Monitor and evaluate for potential infection or inflammation.

categories.label: High-grade fever
categories.advice: Administer antipyretics and evaluate for severe infection.

categories.label: Hyperpyrexia
categories.advice: Immediate cooling measures required to prevent brain damage.

categories.label: Bradypnoea
categories.advice: Assess for respiratory depression, neurological event, or drug overdose.

categories.label: Mild Tachypnoea
categories.advice: Evaluate for mild respiratory distress, pain, or fever.

categories.label: Moderate Tachypnoea
categories.advice: Monitor closely for impending respiratory compromise.

categories.label: Severe Tachypnoea
categories.advice: High risk of respiratory failure requiring immediate intervention.

categories.label: Severe Hypoxia
categories.advice: Immediate high-flow oxygen and airway management.

categories.label: Moderate Hypoxia
categories.advice: Administer supplemental oxygen and investigate cause.

categories.label: Acceptable COPD target
categories.advice: Target range for patients with known type II respiratory failure risk.

categories.label: Mild Hypoxia
categories.advice: Consider low-flow oxygen depending on clinical assessment.

categories.label: Underweight
categories.advice: Evaluate for malnutrition, chronic disease, or eating disorder.

categories.label: Overweight
categories.advice: Recommend dietary modification and increased physical activity.

categories.label: Obese Class I
categories.advice: Initiate structured weight management plan.

categories.label: Obese Class II
categories.advice: Aggressive weight management and assess for metabolic complications.

categories.label: Obese Class III
categories.advice: High risk of severe metabolic complications, consider bariatric options.

categories.label: Hypoglycaemia
categories.advice: Administer fast-acting carbohydrates immediately.

categories.label: Prediabetes IFG
categories.advice: Lifestyle changes recommended; recheck periodically.

categories.label: Diabetes Mellitus
categories.advice: Confirm diagnosis and initiate antidiabetic management.

categories.label: Hypoglycaemia
categories.advice: Administer fast-acting carbohydrates immediately.

categories.label: Impaired
categories.advice: Recommend fasting blood glucose or HbA1c test to evaluate.

categories.label: Diabetes Mellitus
categories.advice: Evaluate for diabetes management.
